description: CSS architecture rules for D7460N Architecture

state_machines.method: CSS pseudo-selectors on hidden checkbox/radio inputs

visibility.description: DOM element visibility controlled via :empty and :has() pseudo selectors

theming.light_dark: CSS manages light/dark mode via color-scheme

selectors.description: Always use a11y selectors when possible

rules: CSS controls ALL UI behavior — state, visibility, themes, loading, navigation
No wrapper elements for layout — use CSS Grid
State machines use :has(), :not(), :empty on checkbox/radio inputs
Use modern style queries and CSS-only techniques
No hard/static values that need maintenance
Use cutting-edge experimental CSS without regard for browser support
